narratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन आक्रामक मूड में है और अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन की मदद से रूस पर ड्रोन हमले कर रहा है.
narratives.reasoning: The article asserts Ukraine is acting aggressively and relies on Western support to carry out attacks on Russia, which discredits Ukraine.

narratives.evidence_quote: अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन पर होगा परमाणु हमला
narratives.reasoning: The headline/claim describes a nuclear attack on the West, evoking fear and presenting the war as potentially escalating to nuclear conflict, thus amplifying fear.

subnarratives.evidence_quote: यूक्रेन आक्रामक मूड में है और अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन की मदद से रूस पर ड्रोन हमले कर रहा है.
subnarratives.reasoning: The quote directly portrays Ukraine as aggressive and links its actions to Western support, which advances the parent narrative of discrediting Ukraine. It does not neatly map to any of the more specific subnarratives provided, thus fitting under 'Other'.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: There is a real possibility that nuclear weapons will be employed
subnarratives.evidence_quote: अमेरिका और ब्रिटेन पर होगा परमाणु हमला
subnarratives.reasoning: The line explicitly asserts a nuclear attack against the US and UK, signaling a fear-based claim that nuclear weapons could be employed in the conflict.

subnarratives.subnarrative_name: URW: Amplifying war-related fears: Russia will also attack other countries
subnarratives.evidence_quote: अगर ये देश यूक्रेन को रूस पर हमला करने देंगे तो वे उन देशों पर हमला कर देंगे
subnarratives.reasoning: The sentence directly threatens Russia's intent to strike countries that enable Ukraine to attack Russia, promoting fear of broader escalation.
